title: Epic 1: Repository Foundation
description: Create directory structure, pyproject.toml with hatchling, credentials.py, unified config.py, and basic __init__.py
close_reason: Directory structure created, pyproject.toml with hatchling, credentials.py, config.py, and __init__.py files all in place. Tests passing.

title: Epic 5: Skills Repository
description: Create gdrive-skills repository with gdrive.md, analyze.md, workflow.md skills
close_reason: Created gdrive-skills repository with gdrive.md, analyze.md, workflow.md skills and README.md

title: Epic 6: Documentation & Polish
description: Write README.md, update CLAUDE.md, create examples directory, final testing
close_reason: Created comprehensive README.md and CLAUDE.md. All tests passing. Documentation complete.

title: Epic 2: Migrate gdrive-download
description: Copy drive modules (downloader, searcher, uploader, converter, etc.), CLI commands, GUI modules, utils, and adapt tests
close_reason: Migrated all gdrive-download modules: drive/, cli/, gui/, utils/. All imports updated to gdrive_unified. Tests passing.

title: Better error message when credentials.json default path missing
description: Running gdrive CLI without -c gives misleading "Path 'credentials.json' does not exist" error pointing at cwd, even when user has creds in a standard location (e.g. ~/.google/credentials.json). Print a cleaner error and/or check standard locations. From gdrive-download-bugreport.md ask #3.

title: Epic 4: Unified CLI & Integration
description: Create unified 'gdrive' entry point, register commands in pyproject.toml, integrate centralized credentials, create integration tests
close_reason: Unified CLI working. Both separate commands (gdrive-*) and unified entry point (gdrive <cmd>) functional. All tests passing.

title: Add CLI smoke tests for gdrive entry points
description: Add tests that invoke gdrive-search, gdrive-download, gdrive-upload with --help and trivial valid arg sets so startup-crash regressions (like the config.downloader AttributeError) get caught in CI. From gdrive-download-bugreport.md ask #2.

title: Epic 3: Migrate document_analyzer
description: Copy analyzer modules (document_analyzer, pattern_matcher), templates (base, aar), create gdrive-analyze CLI, and adapt tests
close_reason: Migrated document_analyzer modules: analyzer/, templates/. Created gdrive-analyze CLI. All imports working.
